chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4342 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025 Mr. Malik Altaf Hussain, advocate for KMC. ------------- This matter was last taken up on 17.10.2024 which is almost a year ago. In the last one year learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today none present for the petitioner without intimation. Despite the name of the petitioner as well as his counsel are appearing in the cause list. It appears that the petitioner has lost his interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
